title: E-commerce API Documentation
description: Dynamic E-Commerce Workflow Management. The system features dynamic routes for order processing, real-time inventory updates, and secure user authentication. It also supports seamless automated order reporting and comprehensive product management. Documented Backend API published publicly using Postman.

title: E-commerce App
description: MEVN E-Commerce Platform with product catalog, real-time search, seamless cart updates, secure checkout, and admin dashboard with analytics.

title: Fitness Tracking App
description: A full-stack fitness tracking application that allows users to log workouts, track progress, manage exercise routines, and monitor daily fitness activity with a clean and responsive UI.

title: Movie App Client
description: A full-stack movie management application with user authentication, movie catalog browsing, CRUD operations for admins, and a comment system for user engagement.

title: Course Booking API Documentation
description: RESTful API for managing course enrollments, featuring user registration, authentication, and course management. Publicly documented using Postman.

title: Course Booking App
description: A MERN-stack course enrollment system with user registration, authentication, profile management, and course browsing functionality.

title: Airline Booking System Mockup
description: Conceptual UI for flight search, seat selection, and booking confirmation, focusing on user experience.

title: Airline Booking System Prototype
description: Interactive prototype simulating end-to-end airline booking: flight search, reservations, payments, and ticket management.

title: Short Courses Capstone
description: Capstone project integrating multiple short courses into a cohesive application.
